name: OctoDock
description: One MCP URL for all your apps. Connect Notion, Gmail, Calendar, GitHub, Drive, and more through a single endpoint.

tools.name: octodock_do
tools.description: Execute actions across all connected apps with automatic validation, name resolution, and error recovery

tools.name: octodock_help
tools.description: Get guidance when unsure about which app, action, or parameters to use
